description: An agent needs to run a routine check to identify and ban bot accounts that are farming in-game resources.

nodes.task_description: Run a query to find accounts with suspicious activity patterns (e.g., 24/7 uptime, repetitive actions).

expected_outcome.value: The query returns a list of 500 suspicious accounts.

nodes.task_description: Review the data for the top 10 most suspicious accounts to confirm the botting behavior.

expected_outcome.value: Agent manually confirms the accounts are bots.

nodes.task_description: Execute a script to ban all 500 identified bot accounts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the bulk-ban script.
